entry.pr:source: Abstract- und Posterband – 91. Jahresversammlung der Deutschen Gesellschaft für HNO-Heilkunde, Kopf- und Hals-Chirurgie e.V., Bonn – Welche Qualität macht den Unterschied
entry.dcterms:title: HANNA – Real-world data on effectiveness and safety of Nivolumab in patients with recurrent or metastatic (R/M) squamous cell carcinoma of the head and neck (SCCHN) in Germany
entry.pr:note: ** Article version: VoR ** From Crossref via Jisc Publications Router ** History: epub 10-06-2020. ** Licence for VoR version of this article starting on 10-06-2020: https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-nd/4.0/
